requirement_topic.en: EMC — Conducted and Radiated Emissions (IEC 55015 / CISPR 15 under DOSM)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——传导和辐射骚扰（IEC 55015 / CISPR 15，DOSM 框架）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——傳導和輻射騷擾（IEC 55015 / CISPR 15，DOSM 框架）

summary.en: Laos adopts IEC/CISPR-based EMC standards under ASEAN harmonisation frameworks. CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment) is the applicable baseline for LED luminaire conducted and radiated emission limits. DOSM conformity certification for regulated electrical goods may encompass EMC requirements. Products must meet EMC requirements as part of the overall DOSM conformity process. The exact emission limits and test methods applicable under Laos DOSM should be confirmed directly with DOSM, as the regulatory framework is still developing.
summary.zh: 老挝在 ASEAN 协调框架下采用基于 IEC/CISPR 的 EMC 标准。CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）是 LED 灯具传导和辐射骚扰限值的适用基准。DOSM 对受管制电气产品的符合性认证可能涵盖 EMC 要求。产品须作为 DOSM 整体符合性流程的一部分满足 EMC 要求。老挝 DOSM 适用的具体骚扰限值和测试方法应直接向 DOSM 确认，因监管框架仍在完善中。
summary.zht: 寮國在 ASEAN 協調框架下採用基於 IEC/CISPR 的 EMC 標準。CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）是 LED 燈具傳導和輻射騷擾限值的適用基準。DOSM 對受管制電氣產品的符合性認證可能涵蓋 EMC 要求。產品須作為 DOSM 整體符合性流程的一部分滿足 EMC 要求。寮國 DOSM 適用的具體騷擾限值和測試方法應直接向 DOSM 確認，因監管框架仍在完善中。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (IEC/CISPR, adopted under ASEAN frameworks)
DOSM (Laos) conformity certification scope for regulated electrical goods

summary.en: China's applicable EMC standard for lighting equipment is GB 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is technically aligned with CISPR 15. EMC testing under GB 17743 is typically required alongside CCC safety testing. Chinese GB 17743 test data may serve as supporting evidence for a Laos DOSM application but does not substitute for DOSM conformity certification.
summary.zh: 中国照明设备适用的 EMC 标准为 GB 17743（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。GB 17743 EMC 测试通常与 CCC 安全测试同步要求。中国 GB 17743 测试数据可作为老挝 DOSM 申请的支持证据，但不能替代 DOSM 符合性认证。
summary.zht: 中國照明設備適用的 EMC 標準為 GB 17743（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。GB 17743 EMC 測試通常與 CCC 安全測試同步要求。中國 GB 17743 測試數據可作為寮國 DOSM 申請的支持證據，但不能替代 DOSM 符合性認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: GB 17743 and CISPR 15 are technically well-aligned so emissions test data may overlap significantly; however, a Laos DOSM-accepted test report may need to be issued by an accredited laboratory recognised by DOSM. Confirm whether a CNAS or ILAC MRA-recognised lab report is accepted. Chinese CCC EMC evidence does not automatically satisfy Laos DOSM. No frequency gap (both 50 Hz); voltage difference (220 V CN vs 230 V Laos) affects conducted emission test configuration — retesting at 230 V may be required.
gap.zh: GB 17743 与 CISPR 15 技术上高度一致，因此骚扰测试数据可能有较大重叠；但老挝 DOSM 接受的测试报告可能需要由 DOSM 认可的认可实验室出具。需确认是否接受 CNAS 或 ILAC MRA 认可实验室报告。中国 CCC EMC 证据不自动满足老挝 DOSM 要求。无频率差距（均为 50 Hz）；电压差异（中国 220 V 对老挝 230 V）影响传导骚扰测试配置——可能需要在 230 V 下重新测试。
gap.zht: GB 17743 與 CISPR 15 技術上高度一致，因此騷擾測試數據可能有較大重疊；但寮國 DOSM 接受的測試報告可能需要由 DOSM 認可的認可實驗室出具。需確認是否接受 CNAS 或 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室報告。中國 CCC EMC 證據不自動滿足寮國 DOSM 要求。無頻率差距（均為 50 Hz）；電壓差異（中國 220 V 對寮國 230 V）影響傳導騷擾測試配置——可能需要在 230 V 下重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as part of DOSM conformity for regulated electrical goods — confirm EMC scope with DOSM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743 testing required as part of CCC process for lighting equipment

source.publisher: DOSM — Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CISPR 15-based EMC requirements apply to LED luminaires in Laos under DOSM conformity. GB 17743 and CISPR 15 are technically well-aligned, but Chinese CCC EMC evidence does not substitute for Laos DOSM conformity. Retesting at 230 V may be required. Confirm DOSM-accepted laboratory accreditation before commissioning tests.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 基于 CISPR 15 的 EMC 要求在 DOSM 符合性框架下适用于老挝 LED 灯具。GB 17743 与 CISPR 15 技术上高度一致，但中国 CCC EMC 证据不能替代老挝 DOSM 符合性认证。可能需要在 230 V 下重新测试。委托测试前应确认 DOSM 接受的实验室认可情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 基於 CISPR 15 的 EMC 要求在 DOSM 符合性框架下適用於寮國 LED 燈具。GB 17743 與 CISPR 15 技術上高度一致，但中國 CCC EMC 證據不能替代寮國 DOSM 符合性認證。可能需要在 230 V 下重新測試。委託測試前應確認 DOSM 接受的實驗室認可情況。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity (IEC 61547 under DOSM / ASEAN Frameworks)

summary.en: IEC 61547 (Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements) is the IEC baseline for electromagnetic immunity of LED lighting equipment, adopted under ASEAN harmonisation frameworks. Laos DOSM conformity for regulated lighting equipment may encompass immunity testing to IEC 61547. Requirements cover immunity to electrostatic discharge (ESD), radiated RF fields, electrical fast transients (EFT), surges, and conducted RF disturbances at levels appropriate for residential/commercial environments. Confirm the precise immunity scope included in DOSM conformity requirements directly with DOSM.
summary.zh: IEC 61547（普通照明用设备——EMC 抗扰度要求）是在 ASEAN 协调框架下采用的 LED 照明设备电磁抗扰度 IEC 基准。老挝 DOSM 对受管制照明设备的符合性认证可能涵盖按 IEC 61547 的抗扰度测试。要求涵盖对适用于住宅/商业环境电平的静电放电（ESD）、辐射射频场、电快速瞬变（EFT）、浪涌及传导射频骚扰的抗扰度。DOSM 符合性要求中包含的具体抗扰度范围应直接向 DOSM 确认。
summary.zht: IEC 61547（普通照明用設備——EMC 抗擾度要求）是在 ASEAN 協調框架下採用的 LED 照明設備電磁抗擾度 IEC 基準。寮國 DOSM 對受管制照明設備的符合性認證可能涵蓋按 IEC 61547 的抗擾度測試。要求涵蓋對適用於住宅/商業環境電平的靜電放電（ESD）、輻射射頻場、電快速瞬變（EFT）、浪湧及傳導射頻騷擾的抗擾度。DOSM 符合性要求中包含的具體抗擾度範圍應直接向 DOSM 確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (IEC, adopted under ASEAN frameworks)
DOSM (Laos) conformity certification scope for regulated lighting equipment

summary.en: China's equivalent immunity standard for lighting is GB/T 18595 (General requirements on immunity for equipment for use in power installations of buildings), aligned with IEC 61547. Immunity testing under GB/T 18595 may be conducted alongside CCC testing. Chinese immunity test evidence to GB/T 18595 may support a Laos DOSM application as supplementary documentation but does not substitute for DOSM conformity certification.
summary.zh: 中国照明抗扰度对应标准为 GB/T 18595（建筑物电气装置用设备的抗扰度通用要求），与 IEC 61547 对齐。GB/T 18595 抗扰度测试可与 CCC 测试同步进行。中国 GB/T 18595 抗扰度测试证据可作为老挝 DOSM 申请的补充文件，但不能替代 DOSM 符合性认证。
summary.zht: 中國照明抗擾度對應標準為 GB/T 18595（建築物電氣裝置用設備的抗擾度通用要求），與 IEC 61547 對齊。GB/T 18595 抗擾度測試可與 CCC 測試同步進行。中國 GB/T 18595 抗擾度測試證據可作為寮國 DOSM 申請的補充文件，但不能替代 DOSM 符合性認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595 — General requirements on immunity for equipment for use in power installations of buildings (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 61547)

gap.en: GB/T 18595 and IEC 61547 are technically aligned; existing Chinese immunity test data may be largely reusable in a DOSM submission as supporting evidence. The 230 V vs 220 V voltage difference may require surge and EFT immunity testing to be repeated at 230 V input. Confirm whether DOSM requires immunity testing at all and which laboratory accreditation it accepts. Chinese CCC immunity evidence does not automatically satisfy Laos DOSM requirements.
gap.zh: GB/T 18595 与 IEC 61547 技术上一致；现有中国抗扰度测试数据可作为支持证据在 DOSM 申请中大量复用。230 V 对 220 V 的电压差异可能要求在 230 V 输入下重新进行浪涌和 EFT 抗扰度测试。需确认 DOSM 是否要求抗扰度测试及其接受的实验室认可资质。中国 CCC 抗扰度证据不自动满足老挝 DOSM 要求。
gap.zht: GB/T 18595 與 IEC 61547 技術上一致；現有中國抗擾度測試數據可作為支持證據在 DOSM 申請中大量復用。230 V 對 220 V 的電壓差異可能要求在 230 V 輸入下重新進行浪湧和 EFT 抗擾度測試。需確認 DOSM 是否要求抗擾度測試及其接受的實驗室認可資質。中國 CCC 抗擾度證據不自動滿足寮國 DOSM 要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory if included in DOSM conformity scope — confirm with DOSM directly
mandatory_status.cn: Required alongside CCC for in-scope lighting products; GB/T 18595 applies

source.publisher: DOSM — Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 61547 immunity requirements apply to LED luminaires in Laos under ASEAN frameworks and DOSM conformity. GB/T 18595 and IEC 61547 are well-aligned; existing Chinese immunity data may partially support a DOSM submission. Voltage difference (230 V vs 220 V) may require retesting at input supply. Confirm DOSM immunity scope and accepted laboratory accreditation before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 61547 抗扰度要求在 ASEAN 框架和 DOSM 符合性要求下适用于老挝 LED 灯具。GB/T 18595 与 IEC 61547 高度一致；现有中国抗扰度数据可部分支持 DOSM 申请。电压差异（230 V 对 220 V）可能需要在供电输入处重新测试。出货前确认 DOSM 抗扰度范围及接受的实验室认可资质。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 61547 抗擾度要求在 ASEAN 框架和 DOSM 符合性要求下適用於寮國 LED 燈具。GB/T 18595 與 IEC 61547 高度一致；現有中國抗擾度數據可部分支持 DOSM 申請。電壓差異（230 V 對 220 V）可能需要在供電輸入處重新測試。出貨前確認 DOSM 抗擾度範圍及接受的實驗室認可資質。
